data.body: a8e5 completion-verifier surfaced 4 GENUINE gaps (my subagent handoff under-scoped a8e5 vs its full ACs — I'd focused it on the 3 core components + verifier prompts). Implemented all 4: (1) f1fa 11:44 regression fixture (norm ne7642adbf79) — false-absence dropped via veto, true-absence survives; (2) explicit test that the DET hygiene backstop never touches LLM-tier findings (a subject-less LLM finding survives pass3_over_findings); (3) test that an OA-cleared finding still survives on another axis (divergent_implementation=high -> impact>=0.85); (4) AC5 — added ADR-0043 [operator-attested] ANTI-FP vocabulary to E2/F1/E6 rubric prompts + a new Pass-4 coach move '14 state attestation evidence' (MOVE_REGISTRY + doc move-table row). Inserted move/row 14 after move/row 9 (not at the end) to avoid a stacking conflict with d4cf's move 13 — parity test uses set membership so order is irrelevant; fold + d4cf rebase were conflict-free. All a8e5 tests + parity + prompt-front-matter green; lint+typecheck clean. Re-closing a8e5 (verifier is slow, ~8min, run in bg).
